claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a hidden holdout result, temporal transfer, real-device transfer, hardware performance, general route-generation advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: three generated dense-XY routes and three calibration-exposure-selected denominators prepared on previously unused fake backends

requirements.label: R149 provenance and task builder are bound
three previously unused seven-qubit backend classes are explicit
240 seeded automatic denominator candidates are compiled
all 384 generated and denominator circuits preserve semantics
diagnostics do not influence selection and R149 hidden rows stay unused
no R150 holdout is executed during design
hardware, transfer, advantage, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

title: B4/B8 R150 unseen-backend dense-XY candidate generation design
